raw: This pass allows 1/2 price admission for up to three (3) people for the Discovery Museum, as well as Discovery Woods. Any people accompanying the 3 pass users will still pay the regular admission fee of $19. Visitors are advised to confirm Museum's public hours by visiting www.discoveryacton.org or by calling The Museum at (978) 264-4200. This pass is NOT a ticket reservation; you must purchase tickets at the Museum upon arrival. Advanced tickets reservations are no longer required.
